cardio.workout: 2×15 min @ T (3 min jog recovery), treadmill 1% or flat road

targets.hr: ~172–183 work (anchor RPE/pace — off-191 zones skew low for running, Adj #9)

cardio.warmup: 1.0–1.5 mi easy build to T pace (9:30 → 8:00/mi), cadence building to ~178
cardio.cooldown: 1.0 mi easy Z1 (9:45–10:45/mi) + SI prehab (clamshell, single-leg bridge, bird-dog, side plank)
